entries._comment: This run repo's scoreboard entry. It is auto-DISCOVERED by the harness (topic 'quantum-harness-run' + this file) — no PR to the central entries.json needed. The aggregator fetches it, re-judges the linked proof_bundle against the canonical hidden reference, and checks the metric matches before ranking it.
entries.model_usage: FIRST REAL MODEL RUN — Opus 4.8 designed the ansatz and tuned its parameters against the bench until the judge ACCEPTed; auto-discovered from this public run repo
entries.why_it_scores: First verified design for tfim3: a hardware-efficient ansatz (Ry layer + open-chain CX, 2 CX) reaches energy -2.9948 (gap 0.0143 to E0=-3.0090), beating the product-state baseline -2.72. Headroom remains — a richer ansatz can push the gap toward zero and take rank 1.
